name: Worktree Squad Retrospective Review
description: Run a deterministic retrospective at assignment closeout and emit actionable improvements for the next loop.

notes: Retrospective findings must be evidence-backed and bounded.
Use the Starfish format by default unless AJ requests a different retrospective style.
Use the hybrid method by default when persona fidelity or process quality is under evaluation.
Make declared roles, actual participants, and participant evidence explicit; planned roles are not the same as active contributors.
Record feature, product, and process confidence separately.
Do not convert retrospective conclusions into broad implementation without AJ review.
Action items should include owner and next checkpoint.
